name: Cinematic Short: A deadpan reality TV show where an anthropomorphic

inputs.prompt:
You are a film director planning a short film. Concept: "A deadpan reality TV show where an anthropomorphic Strangler Fig and delicate Fern maintain polite, perfectly symmetrical composure in a pastel mint-green brutalist diorama, while a hidden parasitic betrayal unfolds, ending in a stark UV biometric confessional and cryogenic freezing.". Mood: whimsical macabre.
Plan exactly 5 scenes. For each scene, write a vivid image generation prompt (2-3 sentences) describing the visual.
Output ONLY a JSON array of strings, one prompt per scene. Example: ["scene 1 prompt", "scene 2 prompt"]

plan.lastChunk:
nitrogen vapor adds a whimsical, macabre finality to the grim reality show diorama."
]

descriptions: This digital art utilizes a stop-motion animation aesthetic, featuring anthropomorphic plant figures in a detailed 3D diorama. A mandrake-like man in a tweed suit and a fern figure wearing a lace collar sit in blocky concrete chairs. The composition mimics a surreal talk show set, framed by an out-of-focus vintage camera in the foreground. The scene is set in a monochrome mint-green room with brutalist textures and miniature architectural details. Soft, diffused overhead studio lighting creates a clean, even atmosphere with subtle shadows. The palette blends pastel teal backgrounds with earthy plant browns and vibrant foliage greens. A wide-angle perspective with shallow depth of field highlights the intricate textures of the roots and fabric. The overall mood is whimsical yet uncanny, evo… <+35 chars>

A high-detail 3D digital render with a tactile diorama aesthetic, blending surrealist fantasy and cinematic miniature photography. A towering tree-creature in a tweed blazer sits opposite a small fern-headed figure in a lace shawl, extending a knotted root-arm toward them. The symmetrical composition centers on blocky teal benches within a minimalist, brutalist room of mint-green concrete modules. Digital countdown displays and small animal skulls decorate the walls. Soft, sterile overhead lighting creates a cold, diffused atmosphere with gentle shadows. The color palette consists of pale mint, sage, and earthy wood tones. This sharp macro render features realistic bark textures and high-fidelity concrete surfaces. The overall mood is melancholic and dystopian, evoking ritualistic tension … <+16 chars>

This surreal stop-motion diorama features two anthropomorphic plant figures in a wide, centrally framed composition. A seated creature made of intricate ferns interacts with a standing tree-man sporting a mossy beard and a tan cardigan. They are positioned within a brutalist interior of pale-green, textured concrete blocks, accented by exposed copper pipes and a small CRT monitor. Diffused overhead lighting casts soft shadows across the clinical environment, emphasizing a monochromatic mint-green palette. High-resolution macro details showcase the tactile contrast between rough concrete, soft knit wool, and organic foliage. The overall aesthetic is somberly surreal, blending domestic mundanity with bizarre botanical life.

A high-fidelity 3D digital render presents a surrealist fantasy scene. A gnarled wood-ent and a leaf-covered fern-spirit sit on gray pedestal chairs, sharing tea on a silver tray. The symmetrical composition is centered within a minimalist mint-green hall featuring repeating arches and floating light embers. Visible studio softbox lights provide soft, uniform illumination, creating a curated, artificial atmosphere. The color palette is dominated by monochromatic mint, contrasted by the figures' earthy browns and vibrant greens. Rendered with hyper-detailed textures and a wide-angle perspective, the image maintains sharp focus across all elements. The overall aesthetic is whimsically sterile, merging organic forms with rigid, modern architectural design.

This stop-motion miniature diorama features a surrealist, dollhouse aesthetic. A tall anthropomorphic tree figure in a tweed vest and a fern-clad child figure flank an owl skull on a pedestal in a symmetrical, stagelike composition. They stand within a mint-green concrete room featuring brutalist stairs and a block-letter sign reading "ELIMINATION DIORAMA: FINAL ROSE." Clinical overhead lighting mixes with a soft purple glow from a retro monitor nestled in a central arched alcove. The color palette is dominated by monochromatic seafoam green contrasted with natural woody browns and neon accents. Macro photography captures high tactile detail and sharp focus across the textured miniature set. The overall mood is uncanny, melancholic, and clinical.

prompts: A slow camera zoom-in through a vintage lens into a mint-green brutalist talk show set. The mandrake-like man in a tweed suit gestures with stiff, stop-motion movements while talking to the fern figure. The lighting is soft and studio-quality, emphasizing the tactile textures of their mossy skin and the concrete chairs.

The camera pans slowly as the towering tree-creature extends a knotted, creaking root-arm toward the fern-headed figure. On the mint-green walls, digital countdown displays flicker and change numbers rapidly. The atmosphere is tense and ritualistic, with tiny dust motes dancing in the sterile overhead light.

A medium shot of the moss-bearded tree-man leaning toward the seated fern creature, his cardigan moving slightly with his breath. Behind them, the CRT monitor flickers with green static while steam rises from the exposed copper pipes. The stop-motion aesthetic is emphasized by the jerky but fluid botanical movements.

A symmetrical wide shot of the two plant figures sharing tea in the arched hall. Floating embers drift slowly through the air like fireflies. The wood-ent lifts a silver teacup with a trembling branch, while the studio softbox lights create a clean, artificial glare on the mint-green surfaces.

The final scene of the 'Elimination Diorama.' The camera pulls back to reveal the tree figure and fern-child flanking the owl skull. The 'FINAL ROSE' sign flickers with a cold neon hum, and the purple glow from the retro monitor pulses like a heartbeat against the seafoam green concrete.

You are a film director planning a short film. Concept: "A deadpan reality TV show where an anthropomorphic Strangler Fig and delicate Fern maintain polite, perfectly symmetrical composure in a pastel mint-green brutalist diorama, while a hidden parasitic betrayal unfolds, ending in a stark UV biometric confessional and cryogenic freezing.". inputs.description: whimsical macabre visual style for a short film about: A deadpan reality TV show where an anthropomorphic Strangler Fig and delicate Fern maintain polite, perfectly symmetrical composure in a pastel mint-green brutalist diorama, while a hidden parasitic betrayal unfolds, ending in a stark UV biometric confessional and cryogenic freezing.

data.workflowName: Cinematic Short: A deadpan reality TV show where an anthropomorphic

data.text: wide, symmetrical shot of a pastel mint-green brutalist living room diorama functioning as a reality TV set. Two
anthropomorphic plants, a towering Strangler Fig in a tailored suit and a delicate Fern in a lace dress, sit rigidly
on a concrete sofa with deadpan expressions. The lighting is flat and cheerful, contrasting with the unsettling stillness of their perfectly

mirrored posture.",
  "A medium shot shows the pair politely sipping tea from identical geometric cups, maintaining flawless, emotion
less eye contact with the studio camera. Beneath the pastel concrete table, the Strangler Fig’s thick, woody vines
discreetly uncoil, creeping toward the Fern's delicate root system in a whimsical yet sinister display of hidden parasitism

. The mint-green walls emphasize the sterile, controlled environment of the bizarre reality show.",
  "A close-
up reveals the macabre betrayal as the Strangler Fig's vines tightly lace up the Fern's torso like a
corset, though both characters remain cheerfully deadpan. The Fern's delicate fronds are slightly wilting against the harsh
lines of the pastel brutalist architecture, trapped in a suffocating, polite embrace. Bright studio lights highlight the absurdity of

their continued, composed postures amidst the quiet strangulation.",
  "The setting abruptly shifts to a stark, dark conf
essional booth illuminated strictly by harsh ultraviolet light. The Strangler Fig stares directly into the camera, its parasitic biometric network glowing
in neon purples and greens, revealing the digested life force of the Fern pulsating within its trunk. The mood is a

chilling blend of reality TV gossip and alien autopsy, devoid of the previous pastel warmth.",
  "The narrative concludes in
a symmetrical, frost-covered cryogenic chamber built into the mint-green concrete walls. The Strangler Fig and the engulfed
Fern are permanently frozen together inside a glowing glass pod, preserving their polite, deadpan embrace for eternity. Billowing white

nitrogen vapor adds a whimsical, macabre finality to the grim reality show diorama."
]

values.text: sitting rigidly at opposite ends of a velvet sofa
sharing a tense, unblinking afternoon tea
maintaining polite distance while a single vine creeps closer
smiling awkwardly as roots slowly entangle beneath the floorboards
engaging in a passive-aggressive pruning competition
exchanging pleasantries while sap drips ominously
locked in a suffocating, yet elegant, ballroom dance
performing a coordinated parasitic strangulation
staring blankly during a stark biometric confessional
frozen mid-betrayal in a cryogenic state
designed like a sterile mid-century modern living room
featuring oppressive geometric concrete furniture
decorated with sharply angled pastel mint pedestals
resembling an isolation chamber disguised as a cozy den
with miniature reality TV cameras hidden in the brutalist corners
featuring perfectly symmetrical but unsettlingly narrow doorways
with stark confessional booth dividers made of frosted glass
transitioning into a cold, clinical elimination room
with a claustrophobic ceiling made of ribbed mint concrete
equipped with cryogenic freezing pods disguised as wardrobes
flat, shadowless pastel studio lighting
uncanny, artificially cheerful daytime fill light
soft diffused minty overhead fluorescent tubes
harsh, interrogative reality TV spotlights
moody chiaroscuro creeping from the brutalist shadows
sickly green bioluminescent ambient glow
flickering, faulty neon casting ominous silhouettes
stark, glowing ultraviolet biometric scanning lasers
cold, clinical blue and cyan cryogenic backlighting
perfectly manicured but slowly decaying fern fronds
an unsettlingly symmetrical arrangement of fallen dead leaves
a single drop of dark amber sap on a pristine teacup
subtle signs of parasitic chlorophyll draining
hidden roots secretly piercing the pastel concrete
frost beginning to crystallize on dying botanical limbs
delicate leaves forming a suffocating noose
UV-reactive warning markings on the strangler fig
a hidden microphone boom dripping with plant poison
wide, deadpan symmetrical establishing shot
static, unblinking medium two-shot
low-angle brutalist architectural hero shot
stark front-facing confessional medium close-up
claustrophobic overhead architectural floor-plan view
voyeuristic hidden-camera high angle shot
intrusive macro close-up on the entangling roots
dutch angle emphasizing the parasitic betrayal

descriptions: This digital art utilizes a stop-motion animation aesthetic, featuring anthropomorphic plant figures in a detailed 3D diorama. A mandrake-like man in a tweed suit and a fern figure wearing a lace collar sit in blocky concrete chairs. The composition mimics a surreal talk show set, framed by an out-of-focus vintage camera in the foreground. The scene is set in a monochrome mint-green room with brutalist textures and miniature architectural details. Soft, diffused overhead studio lighting creates a clean, even atmosphere with subtle shadows. The palette blends pastel teal backgrounds with earthy plant browns and vibrant foliage greens. A wide-angle perspective with shallow depth of field highlights the intricate textures of the roots and fabric. The overall mood is whimsical yet uncanny, evoking a stylized, botanical theater.

A high-detail 3D digital render with a tactile diorama aesthetic, blending surrealist fantasy and cinematic miniature photography. Soft, sterile overhead lighting creates a cold, diffused atmosphere with gentle shadows. The color palette consists of pale mint, sage, and earthy wood tones. This sharp macro render features realistic bark textures and high-fidelity concrete surfaces. The overall mood is melancholic and dystopian, evoking ritualistic tension and quiet dread.

The overall aesthetic is somberly surreal, blending domestic mundanity with bizarre botanical life.

Rendered with hyper-detailed textures and a wide-angle perspective, the image maintains sharp focus across all elements. The overall aesthetic is whimsically sterile, merging organic forms with rigid, modern architectural design.

Clinical overhead lighting mixes with a soft purple glow from a retro monitor nestled in a central arched alcove. prompts: A slow camera zoom-in through a vintage lens into a mint-green brutalist talk show set. The mandrake-like man in a tweed suit gestures with stiff, stop-motion movements while talking to the fern figure. The lighting is soft and studio-quality, emphasizing the tactile textures of their mossy skin and the concrete chairs.

The camera pans slowly as the towering tree-creature extends a knotted, creaking root-arm toward the fern-headed figure. On the mint-green walls, digital countdown displays flicker and change numbers rapidly. The atmosphere is tense and ritualistic, with tiny dust motes dancing in the sterile overhead light.

A medium shot of the moss-bearded tree-man leaning toward the seated fern creature, his cardigan moving slightly with his breath. Behind them, the CRT monitor flickers with green static while steam rises from the exposed copper pipes. The stop-motion aesthetic is emphasized by the jerky but fluid botanical movements.

A symmetrical wide shot of the two plant figures sharing tea in the arched hall. Floating embers drift slowly through the air like fireflies. The wood-ent lifts a silver teacup with a trembling branch, while the studio softbox lights create a clean, artificial glare on the mint-green surfaces.

The final scene of the 'Elimination Diorama.' The camera pulls back to reveal the tree figure and fern-child flanking the owl skull. The 'FINAL ROSE' sign flickers with a cold neon hum, and the purple glow from the retro monitor pulses like a heartbeat against the seafoam green concrete.
